_note: SIP deployment sheet — update monthly. Only months listed here count as deployed; everything else renders as planned at ₹0 (nothing is assumed). 'base' (top-level) is the committed stream split used for the composition bar and floor stat; each month row records actuals: 'base' = base amount that actually fired, 'triggers' = number of discretionary ₹triggerSize picks fired. fyLabel/fyStartMonth drive the 12-cell calendar.
